productionFallbackRiskAcceptance.scope: EMSI DM production use of pure Swift, pure Kotlin, and managed C# ML-KEM-768 fallbacks when an official or native platform provider is unavailable.
constraints: Production fallback selection requires explicit application opt-in.
Production fallback selection must use the EMSI DM maintainer risk-acceptance gate.
Official or native platform providers remain preferred when complete and protocol-compatible.
nonClaims: No formal constant-time proof is claimed.
No external independent crypto-review acceptance is claimed.
